title: hemionitis cuneata
intro: Hemionitis cuneata, also known as Wedge-lobed Hemionitis or Wedge-lobed Liverwort, is a species of liverwort in the family Hemionitidaceae. It is a small, non-vascular plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting liver function. Hemionitis cuneata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
